collectiondata.overview:
Best India to Switzerland Tour Package – Experience Alpine Magic and European Charm

Step into a dream where turquoise lagoons kiss powder-white beaches, and every sunset paints the sky with hues of love. The best India to Switzerland tour package begins your journey into a world of serene lakes, towering peaks, and storybook towns. With Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency, celebrated Best Tour Operator, and distinguished Best International Tour Operator, every moment becomes an artful vignette. Opt for our Switzerland tour packages from India or tailor your sojourn with the Switzerland tour packages for family or the expert touch of our Switzerland tour package for couple. Our Switzerland tour package price is designed to suit all budgets, offering premium experiences at great value.

Why Choose a Switzerland Tour Package from India?

Direct Flights and Seamless Schengen Visa Support
Delhi to Switzerland tour package and Switzerland tour package from Bangalore, Mumbai, Kolkata, and Chennai offer direct connectivity and full assistance with Schengen visa application and documentation.

Breathtaking Landscapes, Luxury Trains, and Historic Towns
Switzerland offers unparalleled scenery—from Interlaken's alpine charm to Lucerne’s medieval bridges. Enjoy seamless travel aboard panoramic trains included in the Switzerland tour package from India. For broader travels, check our India to Europe Tour package or the India to italy Tour package for cultural diversity.

Ideal for Honeymooners, Families, and Nature Lovers
Whether it’s the Switzerland tour package for couple featuring romantic lake cruises or Switzerland tour packages for family with child-friendly activities, Travelxploria has it covered. Solo adventurers can explore with our solo travel packages, while thrill seekers might prefer our adventure tour packages.

Top India to Switzerland Tour Packages

7 to 10 Days Switzerland Tour Package from India – Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken & Geneva
A best India to Switzerland tour package featuring lakeside cities, mountaintop excursions, scenic rail rides, and guided walking tours in old towns.

Switzerland Honeymoon Packages for Indian Couples
Our India to Switzerland honeymoon tour package affordable options include private picnics in alpine meadows, couple’s spa treatments, and candlelight dinners. Explore romantic options alongside other top destinations like India to france Tour package or greece tour packages from india for multi-country trips.

Budget-Friendly Switzerland Tour Packages from India
These affordable India to Switzerland tour package selections combine great value with scenic experiences—perfect for every budget traveler. Also consider our turkey tour packages from india or jordan tour packages from india for exotic alternatives.

Customized Switzerland Itineraries for Groups and Families
Choose flexible packages including Switzerland tour package from Kerala and Bangalore with family-oriented excursions and group-friendly accommodations.

Must-Visit Places in Switzerland Covered in Tour Packages

Interlaken – Adventure Sports and Alpine Views
Enjoy funicular rides, mountain hiking, and boat cruises around Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, ideal for families and couples.

Lucerne – Chapel Bridge, Lion Monument & Mt. Pilatus
Explore the old town and take a thrilling cableway ride up to Mt. Pilatus, part of the best India to Switzerland winter tour package.

Jungfraujoch – Top of Europe by Scenic Train
Ride the cogwheel train to Jungfraujoch for ice tunnels, glacier views, and Europe’s highest railway station. The Switzerland tour package cost includes scenic journeys like this.

Zermatt – Matterhorn and Glacier Paradise
Part of our 3 day Switzerland tour packages, Zermatt offers panoramic cable cars and the iconic Matterhorn view.

Geneva and Zurich – Lakeside Cities and Swiss Luxury
Explore Geneva’s Jet d’Eau and Zurich’s elegant streets, gourmet dining, and modern art museums.

What’s Included in the Best India to Switzerland Tour Packages?

Return Flights and Airport Transfers
Whether it’s Switzerland tour package from Chennai or Delhi, we include round-trip flights and all local transfers.

Hotel Stays with Daily Breakfast
From boutique hotels in Lucerne to luxury resorts in Zermatt, breakfast is always included.

Swiss Rail Pass and Local Transportation
All packages come with a Swiss Rail Pass for unlimited travel on scenic routes.

Sightseeing Tours, Visa Assistance, and Travel Insurance
Get guided tours to top attractions, plus assistance for Schengen visas and full travel insurance coverage.

Best Time to Visit Switzerland from India

April to June – Spring Blooms and Snow-Capped Peaks
Ideal for scenic train rides and early summer festivals.

July to September – Summer Adventures and Festivals
Great weather for mountain hikes, lake cruises, and cultural events.

December to February – Winter Sports and Christmas Magic
Perfect for ski holidays and part of the best India to Switzerland winter tour package. For other snowy adventures, consider our iceland tour packages from india or India to finland Tour package.

Frequently Asked Questions About India to Switzerland Tour Packages

Is a Schengen visa required for Switzerland from India?
Yes. Travelxploria provides end-to-end assistance with Schengen visa for your Switzerland tour package from India.

What is the ideal duration for a Switzerland trip?
A 7 to 10-day itinerary is ideal, though our 3 day Switzerland tour packages are perfect for shorter getaways.

Is Switzerland safe and suitable for family travel from India?
Absolutely. Our Switzerland tour packages for family include safe accommodations, easy transport, and kid-friendly sightseeing.

Do you offer an affordable India to Switzerland tour package?
Yes. We have affordable India to Switzerland tour package options starting at INR 89,999 including flights, hotels, transfers, and basic sightseeing. Optional activities like ski passes or gourmet dining may cost extra.

What’s the best India to Switzerland winter tour package?
Our winter special includes snow excursions to Jungfraujoch and Mt. Titlis, Christmas market visits, and scenic rides aboard the Glacier Express.

Do you provide India to Switzerland honeymoon tour package affordable plans?
Yes. Our India to Switzerland honeymoon tour package affordable deals come with romantic accommodations, spa add-ons, and special couple activities.

How to Book the Best India to Switzerland Tour Package

Trusted Indian Travel Agencies Offering Switzerland Packages
Travelxploria is your trusted expert for Switzerland tour packages from Kolkata, Bangalore, Mumbai, and other Indian cities.

Online Booking Tips and Early-Bird Discounts
Book early for the best rates on flights and exclusive upgrades.

Required Travel Documents and Packing Checklist
Ensure your passport is valid for 6+ months, carry multiple visa photos, Swiss franc currency, and layer-ready clothes for Alpine climates.
For additional travel inspiration, explore our Tour Package India page or consider exciting trips to Spain tour packages from india and India to Mauritius Tour Package.
With Travelxploria’s best India to Switzerland tour package, discover the timeless allure of the Alps and the cultural richness of European towns. Whether you’re looking for a Switzerland tour package from Kerala, planning a Switzerland tour package for couple, or searching for 3 day Switzerland tour packages, we tailor every experience to perfection. Ask our team today for a detailed Switzerland tour package cost breakdown and plan your unforgettable journey.

packages.overview:
• Begin your European journey in Switzerland’s vibrant lakeside city.

  • Enjoy alpine adventures and explore the charming town of Lucerne.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel through the scenic Alps into Italy’s fashion capital.

  • Discover the elegance and serenity of Lake Como.

  • Arrive in the enchanting city of canals.

  • Experience Venice’s magic from the water.

  • Travel to the Renaissance heart of Italy.

  • Explore Tuscany’s most iconic gems.

  • Head to the Eternal City filled with ancient wonders.

  • Walk through Rome’s legendary ruins.

  • Discover masterpieces of art and spirituality.

  • Say goodbye with memories of a lifetime.

Arrive in Zurich, Switzerland’s cosmopolitan hub nestled along the scenic banks of the Limmat River and surrounded by alpine beauty. Upon arrival at Zurich International Airport, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax and recover from your journey. If time allows, head out to explore the city’s charming old town, stylish boutiques, or enjoy a peaceful stroll along Lake Zurich. From its medieval architecture to its modern urban flair, Zurich offers a perfect blend of culture, history, and natural beauty, making it an ideal starting point for your European adventure.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Zurich, giving you the perfect opportunity to explore this sophisticated Swiss city at your own pace. Begin your day with a relaxed breakfast, then consider wandering through the charming Altstadt (Old Town), where cobbled streets, historic buildings, and boutique shops create a picturesque atmosphere. Stroll along Bahnhofstrasse, one of the world’s most exclusive shopping avenues, or relax by the serene shores of Lake Zurich. You may also choose to visit museums, such as the Swiss National Museum, or take a short hike up Uetliberg Mountain for panoramic city views. The day is yours to unwind and discover.

Begin your journey from Zurich to Milan aboard a scenic and comfortable train ride through the breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss Alps. As the train winds its way past snow-capped peaks, lush valleys, and charming alpine villages, you'll witness some of Europe's most stunning vistas. The journey takes approximately four hours, offering both relaxation and spectacular views. Upon arrival in Milan, Italy’s fashion and design capital, transfer to your hotel and check in. Spend the remainder of the day at leisure, soaking in the city's vibrant atmosphere, historic architecture, and stylish charm as you begin your Italian adventure.

Embark on a captivating day trip from Milan to the breathtaking Lake Como, a gem nestled at the foot of the Alps. Travel comfortably to this iconic destination, renowned for its stunning scenery, elegant villas, and charming lakeside towns. Explore the picturesque town of Como, stroll along its quaint streets, and visit the magnificent cathedral. Enjoy a scenic boat ride on the lake, passing through beautiful towns like Bellagio or Varenna. Capture postcard-perfect views of the lake and surrounding mountains. After a day immersed in natural beauty and serene elegance, return to Milan with unforgettable memories of this idyllic retreat.

Travel from Milan to Venice by train and witness a smooth transition from Italy’s bustling fashion capital to the romantic charm of the floating city. The journey takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours aboard a high-speed train, offering scenic views of northern Italy’s countryside. Relax in comfort as you glide past vineyards, rolling hills, and charming towns. Upon arrival at Venice Santa Lucia Station, step directly into the heart of the magical lagoon city. Transfer to your hotel and begin soaking in the unique atmosphere of canals, bridges, and timeless architecture that make Venice one of the world’s most iconic destinations.

Whether it’s a moment of tranquility or a romantic escape, Travelxploria guarantees the best experience, making your gondola ride a timeless Venetian memory.

Board a high-speed train from Venice to Florence and enjoy a comfortable journey through the heart of Italy. The ride takes approximately two hours, offering scenic glimpses of the Italian countryside, rolling hills, and quaint towns along the way. As you depart the romantic canals of Venice, prepare to enter the Renaissance capital of Florence, where art, culture, and history await. Upon arrival at Florence’s Santa Maria Novella Station, make your way to the hotel for check-in. Spend the rest of the day exploring Florence’s timeless beauty, from cobbled streets to the iconic Duomo, soaking in the city’s artistic atmosphere.

Travel from Florence to Rome aboard a high-speed train, enjoying a swift and scenic ride through the picturesque landscapes of Tuscany and Lazio. The journey takes approximately 1.5 hours, offering a comfortable and efficient way to transition from the artistic treasures of Florence to the timeless grandeur of Rome. Relax in your seat as you pass rolling hills, vineyards, and charming Italian towns. Upon arrival at Rome Termini Station, transfer to your hotel and settle in. Use the rest of the day to start exploring the Eternal City, rich with ancient ruins, Renaissance architecture, and vibrant local culture around every corner.

packages.package_name: Melodies of the Alps: Switzerland & Austria Unfolded
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Switzerland’s financial hub and settle in for your Alpine adventure.

  • Explore the scenic landscapes of Heidiland and the tiny principality of Liechtenstein.

  • Discover the medieval town of Stein am Rhein and Europe’s largest waterfall.

  • Travel to the heart of the Austrian Alps via a scenic train ride.

  • Step into a dazzling world of art and crystals in Wattens.

  • Journey to Mozart’s birthplace and Austria’s cultural capital.

  • Visit the iconic hilltop fortress offering panoramic views of Salzburg.

  • Enjoy the breathtaking lakeside village and its postcard-perfect alpine setting.

  • Travel to Germany’s vibrant Bavarian capital.

  • Discover historic sites, grand architecture, and local charm in Munich.

  • Bid farewell to Central Europe with unforgettable memories.

Embark on a mesmerizing adventure through Switzerland’s breathtaking landscapes and the enchanting Principality of Liechtenstein with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for unforgettable experiences. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will lead you through the picturesque Swiss countryside that inspired Heidi’s timeless tale in Maienfeld. Wander through charming villages, lush meadows, and stunning alpine scenery before crossing into Vaduz, the heart of Liechtenstein. Here, marvel at the royal castle, historic sites, and unique cultural gems of this tiny yet fascinating country. Blending Swiss natural beauty with Liechtenstein’s rich heritage, this seamless and enriching journey promises an unforgettable day of exploration. With Travelxploria, every moment is crafted for the best experience.

As you wander through this iconic landmark, enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of Salzburg’s Old Town and the stunning Alpine landscape. With Travelxploria’s seamless service, this tour promises an informative, immersive, and unforgettable experience in Salzburg.

Embark on a picturesque day trip from Salzburg to the fairytale village of Hallstatt, often considered one of the most beautiful places in Austria. Travel through the stunning Salzkammergut region, passing serene lakes and alpine landscapes. Upon arrival in Hallstatt, explore its charming narrow streets, colorful lakeside houses, and historic sites like the Bone House and Market Square. Enjoy a peaceful walk along Lake Hallstatt or take a boat ride for panoramic views. Don't miss the Hallstatt Skywalk for breathtaking vistas. This magical destination offers a perfect blend of natural beauty, history, and tranquility before returning to Salzburg in the evening.

packages.overview:
• Touch down in Zurich and settle into the heart of Switzerland.

  • Explore Zurich’s highlights, enjoy a lake cruise, and visit the Lindt Home of Chocolate.

  • Travel to the luxurious alpine resort town of St. Moritz.

  • Embark on a scenic ride aboard the world-famous Glacier Express.

  • Journey from the Matterhorn village to the lakeside city of Geneva.

  • Discover the breathtaking beauty of the French Alps on a full-day excursion.

  • Bid farewell to Switzerland with unforgettable alpine memories.

Your Zurich adventure begins as you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, ready to guide you through this stunning Swiss city. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, immerse yourself in Zurich’s rich history, culture, and breathtaking scenery. Stroll along the famous Bahnhofstrasse, explore the charming Old Town, and soak in the tranquil beauty of Lake Zurich. Then, hop aboard a scenic boat cruise, gliding past the city’s picturesque skyline from a whole new perspective. The journey culminates at the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where the secrets of Swiss chocolate-making come to life. Indulge in irresistible tastings and witness the artistry behind Switzerland’s finest confections. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—every detail is expertly handled, ensuring a seamless and unforgettable experience. From history to indulgence, this tour offers the perfect blend of culture, relaxation, and sweet delights.

Experience the breathtaking beauty of Zermatt and Mt. Gornergrat with your Travelxploria representative, ensuring the most unforgettable journey through the Swiss Alps. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, begin your adventure with a scenic village walk through Zermatt, a charming, car-free town nestled at the base of the legendary Matterhorn. Wander past traditional wooden chalets, historic churches, and vibrant streets before boarding the iconic Gornergrat Railway, Europe’s highest open-air cogwheel train. As you ascend to 3,089 meters, be mesmerized by panoramic views of the Matterhorn and 29 other towering, snow-covered peaks. Capture stunning photographs, breathe in the crisp mountain air, and revel in the serenity of the Alps. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, this once-in-a-lifetime experience blends nature, adventure, and Swiss charm into a journey you’ll cherish forever.

Experience the breathtaking beauty of Zermatt and Mt. Gornergrat with your Travelxploria representative, ensuring the most unforgettable journey through the Swiss Alps. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, begin your adventure with a scenic village walk through Zermatt, a charming, car-free town nestled at the base of the legendary Matterhorn. Wander past traditional wooden chalets, historic churches, and vibrant streets before boarding the iconic Gornergrat Railway, Europe’s highest open-air cogwheel train. As you ascend to 3,089 meters, be mesmerized by panoramic views of the Matterhorn and 29 other towering, snow-covered peaks. Capture stunning photographs, breathe in the crisp mountain air, and revel in the serenity of the Alps. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, this once-in-a-lifetime experience blends nature, adventure, and Swiss charm into a journey you’ll cherish forever.

After breakfast in the picturesque mountain village of Zermatt, check out from your hotel and make your way to the train station for a scenic journey to Geneva. The train ride offers stunning views of the Swiss Alps, tranquil lakes, and charming countryside as you descend from the high-altitude serenity of Zermatt to the cosmopolitan elegance of Geneva. Relax in comfort as you travel through some of Switzerland’s most beautiful landscapes. Upon arrival, you’ll be transferred to your hotel. Take the rest of the day to unwind or begin exploring Geneva’s beautiful lakeside promenades, international flair, and historic Old Town.

packages.overview:
• Begin your Swiss journey in the vibrant and scenic city of Zurich.

  • Travel to the charming lakeside town of Lucerne by train.

  • Experience snow-covered peaks and glaciers at Mount Titlis.

  • Explore Mt. Pilatus via cableway and cogwheel train for alpine views.

  • Head to Interlaken, the adventure capital nestled between two lakes.

  • Enjoy a free day to relax or explore Interlaken at your own pace.

  • Travel to the car-free mountain village of Zermatt, home of the Matterhorn.

  • Journey to Geneva, Switzerland’s cosmopolitan lakeside city.

  • Discover Geneva’s highlights, from the Jet d’Eau to the UN headquarters.

  • Conclude your Swiss adventure and head home with lasting memories.

Embark on a thrilling full-day Mount Titlis tour, a highlight of your Swiss adventure. From Lucerne, travel to Engelberg and ascend to Mount Titlis via a series of cable cars, including the famous rotating Rotair gondola. At the summit, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views of the Alps and experience eternal snow and glacial landscapes. Explore the Glacier Cave, cross the thrilling Cliff Walk suspension bridge, and enjoy fun snow activities like tubing or snow sledding. This unforgettable alpine experience offers an incredible mix of adventure, natural beauty, and stunning snowy vistas that will leave you mesmerized.

Pilatus tour.","day_summary":"

Begin your adventure from Lucerne with a scenic cruise across Lake Lucerne to Alpnachstad, where you board the world’s steepest cogwheel railway to reach the summit of Mt. Pilatus. Enjoy spectacular panoramic views of the Swiss Alps and surrounding lakes from the top. Take in the fresh mountain air, explore hiking trails, or relax at one of the mountaintop restaurants. Later, descend via the aerial cableway and gondolas to Kriens, then return to Lucerne. This tour perfectly blends breathtaking landscapes, exciting transport experiences, and serene alpine beauty, making it a truly memorable Swiss mountain journey.

Depart from Lucerne and embark on a picturesque train journey to Interlaken aboard the scenic Luzern–Interlaken Express. This route is part of the famous GoldenPass Line, offering breathtaking views of sparkling lakes, lush valleys, charming villages, and majestic mountain peaks. The journey takes around two hours and is a visual delight from start to finish. Upon arrival in Interlaken, nestled between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, check in to your hotel and relax. With the dramatic backdrop of the Jungfrau region, Interlaken welcomes you with its serene beauty and adventurous spirit, setting the tone for an exciting alpine experience.

Enjoy a leisurely day in Interlaken, the heart of the Bernese Oberland, surrounded by the towering peaks of the Eiger, Mönch, and Jungfrau. This day is yours to explore at your own pace—take a peaceful walk along Lake Thun or Lake Brienz, browse local shops for Swiss souvenirs, or relax in a cozy café with breathtaking alpine views. For those seeking adventure, optional activities like paragliding, a scenic Harder Kulm funicular ride, or a boat cruise on the lakes can elevate your day. Whether tranquil or thrilling, Interlaken offers the perfect balance of nature, charm, and unforgettable Swiss hospitality.

Depart Interlaken and journey to the stunning mountain village of Zermatt by train, a scenic ride that showcases some of Switzerland’s most breathtaking landscapes. The route typically involves a transfer at Visp, where you board the cogwheel train that winds its way up to car-free Zermatt. Marvel at the changing views—lush valleys, alpine meadows, and snow-capped peaks. Upon arrival, take in the crisp mountain air and the iconic Matterhorn towering in the background. Check in to your hotel and spend the rest of the day exploring this charming alpine village, known for its pristine beauty and world-class mountain experiences.

to Geneva By Train","day_summary":"

Leave the enchanting village of Zermatt and embark on a scenic train journey to Geneva, Switzerland’s cosmopolitan city by the lake. The trip begins with a descent on the cogwheel train to Visp, where you connect to a high-speed train that travels through the picturesque Rhône Valley. Enjoy views of vineyards, alpine landscapes, and charming towns along the way. As you approach Geneva, the scenery transitions to a vibrant urban skyline beside Lake Geneva. Upon arrival, check into your hotel and begin soaking in the city’s refined atmosphere, rich history, and international flair, with plenty of lakeside charm awaiting discovery.

Uncover the charm and global significance of Geneva with your Travelxploria representative, ensuring the best experience in Switzerland’s vibrant metropolis. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, journey through the city's highlights, from the majestic Jet d'Eau fountain to the enchanting Old Town, where cobbled streets lead to St. Pierre Cathedral and the historic Place du Bourg-de-Four. Delve into Geneva’s role on the world stage with a visit to the International Quarters, home to the United Nations and the Red Cross Headquarters. Stroll along the scenic lakeside promenade, admire breathtaking alpine views, and uncover hidden gems along the way. Trust Travelxploria, the best travel agency, to curate an unforgettable journey through Geneva’s history, culture, and elegance.

packages.overview:
• Begin your Swiss adventure in the scenic city of Zurich.

  • Explore Lucerne and enjoy stunning alpine views from Mount Titlis.

  • Journey to the “Top of Europe” for breathtaking snowy vistas.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris on a comfortable train.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Enjoy a magical day at Disneyland Paris with thrilling rides and entertainment.

  • Shop, dine, or explore more of Paris at your own pace.

  • Bid farewell to Europe with unforgettable memories.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.overview:
• France – Stroll along the Champs-Élysées in Paris, admire the Eiffel Tower, visit the Louvre Museum, and enjoy the romance of the Seine River. Explore the scenic French Riviera with its glamorous beaches and historic towns like Nice and Monaco.
  • Switzerland – Experience the breathtaking landscapes of the Swiss Alps, visit the stunning cities of Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and take a scenic ride on the Glacier Express. Don’t miss the Jungfraujoch, the Matterhorn, and Lake Geneva for a picture-perfect Swiss adventure.
  • Italy – Discover the Eternal City of Rome, home to the Colosseum, Vatican City, and the Trevi Fountain. Explore the artistic wonders of Florence, the romance of Venice, and the stunning coastal beauty of Amalfi and Cinque Terre. Indulge in authentic Italian cuisine and world-class wines.
  • Austria – Immerse yourself in the imperial grandeur of Vienna, with visits to Schönbrunn Palace and St. Stephen’s Cathedral. Experience the musical charm of Salzburg, the birthplace of Mozart, and explore the breathtaking landscapes of Hallstatt and Innsbruck in the Austrian Alps.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Today, we’ll travel to Switzerland. Upon arrival in Geneva, we’ll pass by the Palace of Nations (the European headquarters of the United Nations) and explore the pretty English Garden with its flower clock and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe.




After lunch, we’ll continue our journey through Switzerland, traveling along the scenic routes by Lake Geneva and Lake Neuchâtel. We’ll drive along the Three Lakes region, enjoying views of magnificent vineyards set against the mountain backdrop. We’ll stop in Neuchâtel, where you can enjoy a walk by the lake, explore the historic town center, or visit the beautiful 10th-century castle. Our journey will conclude in Zurich, where we’ll arrive in the late afternoon.

With our guide, we’ll explore Zurich, the most populous city in Switzerland, and its financial and cultural heart. Known for its banks, Zurich has been twice recognized as the city with the best quality of life in the world. Afterwards, we’ll embark on a scenic cruise of nearly two hours on Lake Zurich, with brief stops to enjoy the charming villages along the route. We’ll disembark in Rapperswil, a picturesque village renowned for its medieval castle. We’ll return to Zurich by train, providing an opportunity to experience the efficiency and punctuality of the Swiss railway system.

Step into the heart of Zurich’s history and beauty with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel partner. Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will take you on a seamless exploration of the city’s most iconic landmarks. Stroll along the prestigious Bahnhofstrasse, wander through the charming Old Town, and marvel at the Swiss National Museum and the Zurich Opera House, each brimming with culture and history. Then, transition from land to water on a scenic Lake Zurich cruise, soaking in panoramic views of the city skyline and Swiss Alps. This perfectly curated tour blends culture, history, and breathtaking scenery, ensuring unforgettable memories. With Travelxploria, every journey is crafted to be the best.

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the \"Glacier Village,\" where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We will depart from Venice, traveling to Austria! Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to stroll through the historic city center and enjoy lunch in the Austrian Tyrolean capital. Afterward, we’ll journey along beautiful scenic roads through the mountains to Kitzbühel. Once there, you’ll have time to explore this picturesque village, a famous ski resort where snow can be enjoyed for most of the year. We’ll continue our journey to Salzburg, arriving by the end of the day.

Today, we’ll get to know Austria better. During the morning, we´ll explore Salzburg, Mozart’s city. Its Renaissance and Baroque center is filled with beauty, all in the shadow of the grand castle. Next, we’ll travel through lakes and mountains to reach St. Wolfgang, a renowned pilgrimage site in Austria. We’ll then head to Traunkirchen, located beside the beautiful Traunsee Lake, where we’ll take an included cruise to see four of the lake´s castles before disembarking in Gmunden. Afterward, we’ll continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

Today, we’ll embark on a panoramic tour of this impressive city with a local guide. We’ll explore its majestic avenues, beautiful palaces, large parks and vibrant city center. In the afternoon, you’ll have free time to explore on your own. In the evening, we’ll include a transfer to the Grinzing district, an old wine-growing village now part of the city, known for its traditional taverns. You’ll have free time to dine in the area.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

From breathtaking landscapes to rich cultural experiences, every moment has been a treasure. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any final arrangements, ensuring a smooth and comfortable departure. Though our adventure together comes to an end, the experiences, friendships, and stories will stay with you forever.

packages.overview:
• France – Wander through the romantic streets of Paris, marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame, and visit the historic charm of Rouen.
  • United Kingdom – Experience the royal grandeur of London, explore the medieval beauty of Durham, admire Edinburgh’s castles, and soak in the vibrant culture of Glasgow, Liverpool, and Dublin.
  • Netherlands – Discover the picturesque canals and rich artistic heritage of Amsterdam, home to Van Gogh Museum and Anne Frank House.
  • Belgium – Stroll through the medieval squares of Brussels and Bruges, and indulge in world-famous Belgian chocolates and waffles.
  • Germany – Explore the historic sites of Berlin, the fairytale castles of Bavaria, and the cultural vibrance of Frankfurt and Cologne.
  • Switzerland – Witness the Swiss Alps’ breathtaking beauty, visit Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and enjoy a scenic ride on the Glacier Express.
  • Italy – Step back in time with the Colosseum in Rome, explore the romantic canals of Venice, admire Florence’s Renaissance art, and relax on the stunning coastline of Amalfi.
  • Spain – Immerse in the artistic and architectural wonders of Barcelona and Madrid, experience the passion of flamenco in Seville, and soak up the sun in Costa del Sol.
  • Austria – Enjoy the imperial beauty of Vienna, the musical heritage of Salzburg, and the stunning landscapes of Innsbruck.

[{"city":"Rome","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171054-istockphoto-501396596-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171175-istockphoto-508540910-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171236-istockphoto-539115110-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Rome","day_summary":"

Welcome to Rome! As you arrive in the Eternal City, our Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. After you’ve settled in, our guide will personally meet you, sharing essential details about your journey ahead. You can also find helpful information at the hotel reception. In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, a perfect introduction to Rome’s vibrant atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets and explore a variety of restaurants, setting the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome Fiumicino Airport","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Florence","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1747246882990-AdobeStock_260554885-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289621-istockphoto-1088920100-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289665-istockphoto-1136673014-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Rome to Florence","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome","to":"Florence","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":678,"h_name":"Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Florence","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956443-2024-07-01 (2).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956518-unnamed (40).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956623-2023-01-18.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Venice","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336475-istockphoto-1200916277-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336571-istockphoto-1388018793-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336619-istockphoto-911570904-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Florence to Venice","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Florence","to":"Venice","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":659,"h_name":"Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Venice","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438755-unnamed (15).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438824-unnamed (14).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Venice/Quality Hotel Delfino Venezia Mestre/1741088438859-unnamed (13).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Venice to Innsbruck to Zurich","day_summary":"

We’ll depart Venice and make our way to Austria. Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to explore the historic town center and enjoy lunch. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey through the beautiful Tyrolean landscapes as we cross into Switzerland, arriving in Zurich.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Venice","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Zurich to Lucerne to Zurich","day_summary":"

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Paris","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976316-istockphoto-689710224-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976390-istockphoto-135034702-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976428-istockphoto-847408280-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741635794864-AdobeStock_730104594-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Strasbourgh to Paris","day_summary":"

We’ll depart from Zurich and travel to the French region of Alsace, where we’ll visit its capital, Strasbourg a charming city that beautifully blends French and German influences. You’ll have time to explore and get to know the city. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey to Paris, arriving in the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Zurich","to":"Paris","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":681,"h_name":"Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie","h_country":"France","h_city":"Paris","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535200-5175-11-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535319-5175-16-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535355-unnamed (43).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Paris City Tour","day_summary":"

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise Experience","day_summary":"

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it’s time to bid farewell to this incredible journey. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any last-minute needs, ensuring a smooth departure. As you reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from historic landmarks to breathtaking landscapes, we hope you take home not just souvenirs, but cherished memories that will last a lifetime. Though this adventure comes to an end, the stories and moments shared will stay with you forever.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Paris","to":"Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.package_name: Grand European Odyssey: Castles, Coasts & Culture
packages.overview:
Spain: The Land of Passion & Heritage

1. Madrid – The Spanish Capital of Art & Culture

  • Explore the world-famous Prado Museum, home to masterpieces by Goya and Velázquez.

  • Visit the majestic Royal Palace of Madrid, the largest royal palace in Europe.

  • Stroll through Plaza Mayor and enjoy traditional Spanish tapas.

  • Admire the lively atmosphere at Puerta del Sol, Madrid’s bustling square.

2. Barcelona – Gaudí’s Masterpiece

  • Marvel at the Sagrada Familia, Antoni Gaudí’s architectural wonder.

  • Wander through Park Güell, a colorful, surreal park full of artistic mosaics.

  • Walk along the famous La Rambla, lined with street performers and markets.

  • Visit the Gothic Quarter, filled with medieval history and charming cafes.

3. Seville – The Heart of Andalusia

  • Watch an authentic Flamenco performance in the historic Triana district.

  • Visit the stunning Alcázar of Seville, a blend of Moorish and Spanish architecture.

  • Walk through Plaza de España, an iconic landmark with stunning bridges and canals.

  • Explore the Seville Cathedral and climb the Giralda Tower for panoramic views.

Austria: The Land of Imperial Majesty & Music

4. Vienna – The City of Music & Royalty

  • Visit the opulent Schönbrunn Palace, the summer residence of the Habsburgs.

  • Experience classical music at the Vienna State Opera.

  • Explore the Hofburg Palace, once the center of the Austrian Empire.

  • Stroll through St. Stephen’s Cathedral and the historic city center.

5. Salzburg – Mozart’s Birthplace & Alpine Beauty

  • Discover the stunning Hohensalzburg Fortress, overlooking the city.

  • Visit Mirabell Palace & Gardens, featured in The Sound of Music.

  • Explore Mozart’s Birthplace, a must-visit for music lovers.

  • Enjoy breathtaking views of the Austrian Alps.

[{"city":"Madrid","country":"Spain","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Spain/Madrid/1741002623987-istockphoto-486506604-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Spain/Madrid/1741002624073-istockphoto-1341982530-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Spain/Madrid/1741002624117-istockphoto-1156711489-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Welcome to Madrid","day_summary":"

As you arrive at the airport, our warm and welcoming Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you and assist with your smooth transfer to the hotel. Take this time to unwind, explore nearby sights, or simply relax before your adventure begins. Our representative will be available to answer any questions and ensure a seamless experience. Be sure to check the hotel reception for details about the welcome meeting with your guide and fellow travelers. In the evening, we’ll take you to Plaza Mayor and La Latina, where you can indulge in diverse culinary delights, from Indian and Chinese to Spanish and Middle Eastern cuisines.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Madrid Barajas Airport","to":"Madrid","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":728,"h_name":"Hotel Silken Puerta Madrid","h_country":"Spain","h_city":"Madrid","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Madrid/Hotel Silken Puerta Madrid/1741162175948-2024-10-03 (2).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Madrid/Hotel Silken Puerta Madrid/1741162176040-2024-10-03 (1).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Madrid/Hotel Silken Puerta Madrid/1741162176085-2024-10-03.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Madrid City Tour","day_summary":"

The morning will begin with a comprehensive tour of central Madrid, featuring highlights like Paseo del Prado, Cibeles, Neptuno, Puerta de Alcalá, Plaza de Colón, and Plaza Mayor. We’ll then visit Retiro Park, a beautiful oasis in the city center, where we’ll see the lake and the Palacio de Cristal. Admission is included to the Santiago Bernabéu Stadium, the home of Real Madrid—considered by many to be the best football club in the world. Enjoy the rest of the afternoon at your leisure. In the evening, we’ll provide a return transfer to the hotel.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Barcelona","country":"Spain","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Spain/Barcelona/1741002168098-istockphoto-951974648-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Spain/Barcelona/1741002168130-istockphoto-510009106-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Spain/Barcelona/1741002168165-istockphoto-1418575808-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Madrid to Barcelona","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll leave for Aragon, travelling through the lands of Castile. Our first stop will be in Zaragoza to admire the stunning Cathedral-Basilica of Our Lady of the Pillar. We’ll then journey to the serene Poblet Abbey, one of the best-preserved medieval monasteries in the world (tickets included). Finally, we’ll head to Barcelona, where we’ll arrive in the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Madrid","to":"Barcelona","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":750,"h_name":"Alexandre Hotel Fira Congress","h_country":"Spain","h_city":"Barcelona","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Barcelona/Alexandre Hotel Fira Congress/1741176357170-unnamed - 2025-03-05T173545.105.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Barcelona/Alexandre Hotel Fira Congress/1741176357272-2024-04-24 (1).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Barcelona/Alexandre Hotel Fira Congress/1741176357280-2024-04-24.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Girona","country":"Spain","banner_image":[{"path":"/package/Girona/1744874470469-Girona.jpg"},{"path":"/package/Girona/1744874470541-Girona 1.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Barcelona to Girona","day_summary":"

In the morning, we´ll embark on a tour of the City of Counts. This vibrant city, nestled along the Mediterranean Sea, is famous for Gaudi’s modernist architecture, the bustling Ramblas, and its rich history, highlighted by the Universal Exposition and the Olympics hosted here. Barcelona is renowned as one of the most beautiful and fascinating European capitals. In the evening, we’ll leave Barcelona and travel north into Catalonia. Before settling into our hotel, we’ll take a walk in Girona, exploring its historic center, known for its colorful houses, the old Jewish quarter, and its impressive cathedral.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Barcelona","to":"Girona","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":817,"h_name":"Best Western Premier CMC Girona","h_country":"Spain","h_city":"Girona","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Girona/Best Western Premier CMC Girona/1741601791908-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154612.198.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Girona/Best Western Premier CMC Girona/1741601791977-triplesupletoria_01-min.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Girona/Best Western Premier CMC Girona/1741601792016-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154553.069.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Chambéry","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/package/Chambéry/1744874678438-ChambÃ©ry.jpg"},{"path":"/package/Chambéry/1744874678514-ChambÃ©ry 1.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Girona to Chambery","day_summary":"

We’ll head to France, traveling through the Provence region. Our first stop will be Arles, a small UNESCO World Heritage city known for its connections to Van Gogh. Here, we can visit the Roman theater and quaint Romanesque churches. There will be time to explore and have lunch. Next, we’ll include a visit to Carrières des Lumières, an incredible underground art experience featuring a captivating display of art, images, and sound in an ancient quarry. We’ll arrive in Chambery, the charming capital of Savoy, for the evening, a medieval style city with beautiful historic center and large castle.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Girona","to":"Chambéry","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":818,"h_name":"Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry","h_country":"France","h_city":"Chambéry","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995652-2024-10-18.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995756-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154914.538.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Chambéry/Hôtel Kyriad Chambéry/1741601995762-unnamed - 2025-03-10T154907.457.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Leysin","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/package/Leysin/1744874728567-Leysin.jpg"},{"path":"/package/Leysin/1744874728642-Leysin 1.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Chambéry to Leysin","day_summary":"

We’ll journey to Switzerland, arriving in Geneva. With our guide, we’ll go to Palais des Nations (headquarters of the United Nations in Europe), and we’ll see the beautiful English Garden with its flower clock, and admire the Jet d’Eau, the tallest fountain in Europe. Our next stop will be the charming, walled village of Gruyères, world-renowned for its cheese. Nearby, there are some of Switzerland´s major chocolate factories, including Nestlé. Our tour includes admission to the Maison Cailler Chocolate Factory, where you’ll enjoy a sweet tasting experience.

We’ll continue our journey along scenic roads, passing through bucolic mountain landscapes and picturesque wooden villages, until we reach Chillon Castle, built on the shores of Lake Geneva (admission included). We’ll arrive in Leysin by mid-afternoon, a charming holiday village with spectacular views of the Rhône Valley and Mont Blanc. Leysin is well-known for its winter sports resort and hiking options. Dinner will be included.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Chambéry","to":"Leysin","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":819,"h_name":"Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Leysin","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263067-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155357.715.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263177-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155350.941.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Leysin/Alpine Classic Hotel Leysin/1741602263183-unnamed - 2025-03-10T155341.110.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Zurich","country":"Switzerland","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685873-istockphoto-489763016-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006685977-istockphoto-1141483906-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Switzerland/Zurich/1741006686028-istockphoto-1291781729-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Leysin to Zurich","day_summary":"

We’ll experience stunning mountain scenery today, so be sure to pack your winter clothes. We’ll ascend to Glacier 3000 by cable car ride, one of the most spectacular spots in Switzerland featuring ice and snow year-round, and where you can walk on the suspended bridge between two mountain peaks, explore the Ice Cathedral, or enjoy the Fun Park. We’ll stop in Interlaken for lunch before traveling to Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. In the evening, we’ll arrive in Zurich, with some time to explore the center before heading to the hotel.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Leysin","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Milan","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230155-istockphoto-1440344960-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230259-istockphoto-1803908283-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Milan/1741006230361-istockphoto-496267664-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Milan","day_summary":"

We’ll leave Zurich early in the morning, crossing the Alps to reach the Italian-speaking part of Switzerland. Our first stop will be Bellinzona, renowned for its three medieval castles, which are UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Perched on the hills overlooking the city, these castles highlight Bellinzona´s historical significance as a key alpine stronghold. Enjoy some free time to wander through the charming streets of the center. Next, we´ll enter Italy and stop in the charming town of Como for lunch. This town is considered the jewel of Lombardy, known for its beautiful gardens beside the lake and its spectacular cathedral. We’ll continue to Milan, where our guide will take us to the impressive Piazza del Duomo. You’ll have some time to wander around before we transfer you to the hotel.

Today, we’ll continue our journey to Pisa. We´ll ride a small tourist train to the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles), where you´ll have time to admire one of the most captivating and beautiful art complexes in Italy, including the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Afterwards, we’ll head to Rome, arriving later in the day.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Milan","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.


In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable European adventure, starting in Paris, where you'll explore the Eiffel Tower, Versailles, and enjoy the city by night. Continue to Brussels, visiting Mini-Europe, then head to Amsterdam for its canals, museums, and vibrant neighborhoods. Explore Heidelberg, the Black Forest, and the Rhine Falls in Germany, followed by a journey to Jungfraujoch and Interlaken in Switzerland. Discover the Alpine charm of Innsbruck and the charming city of Ljubljana. In Italy, explore the magic of Venice, the Postojna Caves, and the wonders of Florence and Pisa, before ending your journey in Rome with visits to iconic landmarks like the Colosseum and Vatican City. Finally, fly back home, filled with memories from your European dream tour.​

Begin your day with a delicious breakfast before embarking on a guided city tour of Paris, led by our expert Travelxploria representative and guide. Explore iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Opéra Garnier, Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, and Les Invalides. Ascend to the 3rd Level of the Eiffel Tower, offering a stunning panoramic view of Paris. After a delightful lunch, visit the magnificent Palace of Versailles, a masterpiece of 17th-century French artistry. Later, enjoy a romantic Seine River cruise, passing Notre Dame, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, followed by the enchanting Paris by Night tour. End your perfect day with a sumptuous dinner. Overnight stay in Paris with Travelxploria – the best travel agency.

Amsterdam, the vibrant capital of the Netherlands, is famous for its charming canals, historic architecture, and rich culture. Explore the Canal Ring with a scenic canal cruise, visit world-class museums like the Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh Museum, and take a moment to reflect at the Anne Frank House. Wander through the trendy Jordaan district, enjoy local treats at the Albert Cuyp Market, and soak in the lively atmosphere at a cozy café. Amsterdam offers a perfect blend of history, art, and modern charm, making it a city full of delightful wonders.

Join your Travelxploria representative and expert tour guide for an incredible journey through Germany’s historic Heidelberg, the enchanting Black Forest, and Switzerland’s breathtaking Rhine Falls. Start your day exploring Heidelberg Altstadt, a picturesque old town nestled along the Neckar River, with its medieval charm and the iconic Heidelberg Castle towering above. Stroll through cobblestone streets and visit the stunning Church of the Holy Spirit. Next, venture into the heart of the Black Forest, where you’ll be captivated by its lush landscapes and charming villages. Experience a live demonstration of traditional cuckoo clock craftsmanship, a true Black Forest specialty. Later, travel to Schaffhausen to witness the mighty Rhine Falls, Europe’s largest waterfall, where cascading waters create a mesmerizing spectacle. After a day of exploration, unwind at your hotel in Central Switzerland. Travelxploria, the best travel agency, ensures a seamless and enriching experience. After breakfast, check out and join your Travelxploria guide for a journey to Florence, the birthplace of the Renaissance. Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, explore the city's iconic landmarks, including the Duomo, the Campanile, and the Baptistery with its famed Gates of Paradise. Wander through Piazza della Signoria, home to Renaissance sculptures, and admire the Ponte Vecchio, a historic bridge spanning the Arno River. After a captivating day in Florence, we head to Pisa to see the famous Leaning Tower and the Square of Miracles. With Travelxploria as your trusted agency, this day is sure to be unforgettable. Enjoy breakfast, lunch, and dinner as part of your journey.

After a delicious breakfast, join your Travelxploria representative and guide for an unforgettable day trip to Rome. Begin with a visit to Vatican City, the world’s smallest country, and explore the Vatican Museums, home to classical sculptures and Renaissance masterpieces. Marvel at the Sistine Chapel’s \"Last Judgment\" by Michelangelo and visit St. Peter’s Basilica, a true architectural marvel. Afterward, enjoy an orientation tour of Rome, taking in the Colosseum, the iconic Trevi Fountain, and other renowned landmarks. Enjoy a delightful lunch in the heart of Rome before continuing your tour. End the day with a hearty dinner before heading back to your hotel. With Travelxploria, experience Italy at its finest.

packages.overview:
• Louvre Museum: Home to the world-renowned Mona Lisa and other masterpieces.
  • Notre-Dame Cathedral: Gothic cathedral, a masterpiece of architecture.
  • Champs-Élysées & Arc de Triomphe: Iconic avenue and historical monument.
  • The largest ancient amphitheater, known for gladiatorial contests.
  • Visit St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel, home to Michelangelo’s famous ceiling.
  • An ancient temple turned church with stunning architecture.
  • Toss a coin into the famous Baroque fountain for good luck.
  • The museum where Anne Frank and her family hid during WWII.
  •  Explore Amsterdam’s picturesque canals.
  •  Scenic views and boat rides on the lake in Zurich
  • Explore the glittering world of Swarovski crystals.
  • Florence Cathedral Known for its stunning dome designed by Brunelleschi.
  • Piazza della Signoria: A historic square with statues and fountains.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let Travelxploria’s expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary.

ENJOY GONDOLA RIDE","day_summary":"

After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara.
