packages.package_name: European Odyssey Exploring Iconic Landmarks and Hidden Gems
packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris with Travelxploria’s experienced tour guide, who will introduce you to the city's finest attractions. Marvel at iconic landmarks such as Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, Champs Élysées—one of the most fashionable avenues in the world—Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, Les Invalides, and many more. Next, visit the iconic Eiffel Tower (3rd Level) and enjoy a stunning panoramic view of the city from its summit. With its famous tapering cast-iron structure, the Eiffel Tower is not only the symbol of Paris but of France itself. Your adventure continues with a visit to the Palace of Versailles, an internationally acclaimed masterpiece located just 19 km west of Paris. This magnificent palace, once home to French royalty, is now a UNESCO World Heritage site and has been under the stewardship of the Public Establishment of the Palace, Museum, and National Estate of Versailles, overseen by the French Ministry of Culture since 1995. Let our expert guide take you on a journey through its grand halls, opulent gardens, and fascinating history. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"ENJOY YOUR FUN FILLED DAY AT DISNEYLAND® PARIS - CHOICE OF DISNEY® PARK OR WALT DISNEY STUDIOS® PARK","day_summary":"

Get ready for an unforgettable day of excitement at Disneyland Paris, one of the most popular amusement parks in the world. With the best on ground support staff of Travelxploria, enjoy seamless access to thrilling rides, enchanting attractions, and immersive studio experiences with your loved ones. Choose between Disneyland Park, where fairy tales come to life across five incredible lands filled with classic attractions, spectacular shows, and lively street parades featuring beloved Disney Characters, OR visit Walt Disney Studios Park, where you’ll be amazed by breathtaking stunt shows, witness behind-the-scenes magic of filmmaking, and explore real-life sets used for blockbuster movies. Later, take a romantic cruise along the Seine River, one of the most scenic waterways in the world. Glide effortlessly past exquisite Parisian landmarks such as Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, the Louvre, and the Orsay Museum, while soaking in the city’s historic charm and dazzling skyline. Each bridge you pass under offers a new, mesmerizing view of Paris at its finest. Overnight stay at a hotel in Paris

Get ready for an unforgettable and magical alpine excursion to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a true highlight of your Swiss adventure, exclusively curated by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Your journey begins as you proceed to Grindelwald Terminal, where you board the state-of-the-art 3S-Bahn Eiger Express, which takes you to Eigergletscher Station in just 15 minutes. From there, embark on a spectacular cogwheel train ride to reach the highest railway station in Europe, standing at 11,333 feet—a world of eternal ice and snow. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, where talented artists sculpt breathtaking masterpieces from solid ice. Continue to the Sphinx Observatory Deck, offering awe-inspiring panoramic views of the Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps, ensuring a truly once-in-a-lifetime experience. After a thrilling day, return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria’s expertise has made your journey seamless and extraordinary

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" VISIT MT. TITLIS - ENJOY CABLE CAR RIDES","day_summary":"

Today, get ready for breathtaking scenery and a once-in-a-lifetime experience with an exhilarating journey to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters, exclusively organized by Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency. Ascend the majestic peak using various cable cars, including the Rotair, the world’s first revolving cable car, offering unrestricted 360-degree views of the dazzling snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine white snowfields, dotted with massive ice boulders. At the summit, dare to walk across the famous Cliff Walk, the highest suspension bridge in Europe, for an adrenaline-pumping experience with spectacular panoramic views. Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of the most beautiful cities in Switzerland. Visit the historic Lion Monument and stroll across the iconic Kapellbrücke (Chapel Bridge). Enjoy some leisure time shopping for renowned Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates. To conclude the day, relax on a scenic cruise across the stunning Lake Lucerne, surrounded by picturesque alpine landscapes. Return to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a comfortable overnight stay, knowing that Travelxploria has curated the perfect Swiss adventure for you

 After breakfast, check out from your hotel and embark on a journey to Venice, Italy – a city of magnificent monuments, winding canals, and timeless romance. With the expert guidance of a Travelxploria representative, travel to the pier, where you will board a private boat to St. Mark’s Square, the heart of Venice. Marvel at St. Mark’s Basilica, an architectural masterpiece showcasing stunning Byzantine artistry. Witness the famous Bell Tower and Clock Tower, which displays the signs of the Zodiac and the current phase of the moon. Admire the legendary Bridge of Sighs, a white limestone bridge arching gracefully over the Rio di Palazzo, historically linking the old prisons to the interrogation rooms of the Doge’s Palace. Next, embark on a romantic Gondola ride, gliding through the serpentine canals of Venice. As you drift past ornate baroque buildings, soak in the magical atmosphere of this one-of-a-kind city. This iconic Venetian experience is the perfect way to cherish the enchanting beauty of Venice. After this unforgettable adventure, return to the pier and proceed to your hotel for check-in. Overnight stay at the hotel in Padova, Bologna, or Ferrara

Accompanied by an expert English-speaking guide, take a walking tour through this historic city, immersing yourself in its rich culture and artistic heritage. Later, continue your journey to Pisa, where you will visit the Square of Miracles, home to the world-famous Leaning Tower of Pisa. Admire the awe-inspiring architecture of this stupendous monument, a true marvel of medieval engineering. After an enriching day of history and culture, proceed to your hotel for a relaxing evening. packages.overview:
• Frankfurt, Germany: A bustling metropolis blending modern skyscrapers with rich history. Explore the Römer (Old Town), St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, and the stunning skyline along the River Main. A financial hub with a vibrant cultural scene, including museums, art galleries, and theaters.

  • Paris, France: The epitome of romance, elegance, and art. Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Notre-Dame Cathedral, and take a stroll along the Seine. Paris is known for its café culture, high-end fashion, and world-class museums.

  • Amsterdam, Netherlands: A picturesque city of canals, bikes, and art. Amsterdam offers famous attractions like the Anne Frank House, Van Gogh Museum, and Rijksmuseum. Take a canal cruise, visit quirky neighborhoods like Jordaan, and immerse in the city's vibrant atmosphere.

  • Zurich, Switzerland: Nestled between the serene Lake Zurich and the snow-capped Alps, Zurich is Switzerland’s financial capital. Enjoy the city's medieval old town, Bahnhofstrasse (one of the world’s most exclusive shopping streets), and stunning views of the surrounding mountains and lakes.

  • Innsbruck, Austria: Set in the heart of the Alps, Innsbruck is known for its breathtaking mountain views, ski resorts, and historic charm. Visit the Golden Roof, explore the medieval old town, and discover the surrounding alpine scenery.

  • Florence, Italy: The birthplace of the Renaissance, Florence is a treasure trove of art, history, and architecture. Marvel at masterpieces in the Uffizi Gallery, admire Michelangelo’s David, and visit the stunning Florence Cathedral and Ponte Vecchio.

  • Rome, Italy: A city steeped in ancient history, where every corner tells a story. Explore iconic landmarks such as the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Vatican City, home to St. Peter’s Basilica and the Sistine Chapel. Rome is a blend of historical ruins, vibrant piazzas, and mouth-watering cuisine.

​After a delightful breakfast, set out on an exhilarating city tour with your Travelxploria representative and expert guide, ensuring a seamless experience. Explore London’s most iconic landmarks, including Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Trafalgar Square, and the majestic Tower Bridge. Witness the grandeur of Buckingham Palace and, if lucky, experience the iconic Changing of the Guard ceremony. Cricket enthusiasts will relish an exclusive visit to Lord’s Cricket Ground, delving into its rich history, the Pavilion, and the legendary Ashes Urn, followed by a delicious lunch at this historic venue. Later, marvel at the breathtaking panoramic views from the London Eye, offering a spectacular perspective of the city skyline and the River Thames. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a scenic journey to Heidelberg, where the charming Old Town (Altstadt) awaits. Wander through its cobblestone streets, admire historic houses, and visit the iconic Church of the Holy Spirit, all set beneath the grandeur of Heidelberg Castle. Next, immerse yourself in the beauty of the Black Forest, known for its rolling hills and traditional villages. Witness a fascinating cuckoo clock-making demonstration, a hallmark of Black Forest craftsmanship. Later, journey to Switzerland to marvel at the mighty Rhine Falls, where a thrilling boat ride brings you close to Europe’s largest waterfall. As the day winds down, check in to your hotel in Central Switzerland and savor a delicious dinner before resting for the night.

After a delightful breakfast, set off on a picturesque journey to Interlaken, a charming Swiss town nestled between the stunning Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, offering breathtaking alpine views. Stroll through its quaint streets, soak in the serene beauty, and enjoy a hearty lunch. With your expert Travelxploria tour guide ensuring a seamless experience, continue to Jungfraujoch, the Top of Europe. From Grindelwald Terminal, board the state-of-the-art Eiger Express to Eigergletscher Station before switching to a cogwheel train that ascends to Europe’s highest railway station. Explore the mesmerizing Ice Palace, carved entirely from ice, and take in spectacular views from the Sphinx Observatory, overlooking the Aletsch Glacier. As the day concludes, return comfortably to your hotel for a sumptuous dinner and a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mt. Titlis Adventure & Lucerne Charm","day_summary":"

After a hearty breakfast, embark on a breathtaking alpine adventure with Travelxploria, the best travel agency for seamless and unforgettable experiences. Guided by our expert tour guide and representative, ascend to the majestic Mt. Titlis via a thrilling series of cable cars, including the world’s first rotating Rotair, offering stunning 360° views of the snow-capped Swiss Alps. Experience the adrenaline rush of walking across the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge. Later, explore the picturesque city of Lucerne, where you’ll visit the iconic Lion Monument and stroll along the historic Kapellbrücke. Your journey continues with a delightful visit to the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where you’ll indulge in the rich flavors of Switzerland’s finest chocolates. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch and dinner before returning to your hotel in Central Switzerland for a relaxing overnight stay.

Enjoy a guided mini train ride, offering breathtaking panoramic views of the stunning landscape. Next, visit the world-renowned Swarovski Crystal World in Wattens, where dazzling crystalline masterpieces captivate visitors. Continue to Innsbruck, the enchanting capital of Tyrol, and stroll through Maria Theresien Strasse, lined with historic buildings and lively cafés. Marvel at the iconic Golden Roof, a symbol of Innsbruck’s medieval charm, set against a spectacular Alpine backdrop. After a day filled with beauty and culture, indulge in a sumptuous lunch and dinner before retiring for an overnight stay in Innsbruck.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and embark on a guided tour of Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance, with an expert guide from Travelxploria, the best travel agency. Marvel at the city's most iconic landmark, the Duomo, along with the Campanile and the Baptistery, famous for its Gates of Paradise. Explore Piazza della Signoria, an open air museum adorned with Renaissance sculptures, and admire the Ponte Vecchio, the historic bridge spanning the River Arno. Next, journey to Pisa to witness the architectural wonder of the Leaning Tower of Pisa, set within the breathtaking Square of Miracles. After an enriching day, enjoy a delicious lunch and dinner before retiring for the night. Overnight stay in the Tuscany region.

After a delightful breakfast, check out and journey to Rome, the Eternal City, with an experienced Travelxploria guide ensuring a seamless experience. As the best travel agency, we present an immersive tour of Vatican City, the world’s smallest country. Explore the magnificent St. Peter’s Basilica, the awe-inspiring Sistine Chapel, and Michelangelo’s masterpiece, The Last Judgement. Next, enjoy a delicious lunch before visiting the iconic Colosseum, followed by the legendary Trevi Fountain, where tossing a coin is said to ensure your return. Discover the Victor Emmanuel Monument and the Roman Forum. If Vatican Museum entry is unavailable due to the Jubilee year, our dedicated representative will arrange Colosseum entry instead. End the day with a delightful dinner and an overnight stay in Rome.

packages.overview:
• Iconic Paris Landmarks: Marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Champs Elysées, Place Vendôme, and the majestic Palace of Versailles.

  • Disneyland Fun & Seine Cruise: Thrilling rides at Disney Park, and a romantic, scenic cruise along the iconic River Seine.

  • Enchanting Geneva: Explore Geneva’s landmarks like Jet d'Eau, UN Buildings, and the picturesque Flower Clock with travelxploria’s expert guide.

  • Jungfraujoch - Top of Europe: Reach 11,333 feet to experience stunning snow-covered peaks and breathtaking panoramic views of Aletsch Glacier.

  • Mt. Titlis & Lucerne: Enjoy thrilling cable car rides and captivating views from Mt. Titlis, followed by a scenic tour of Lucerne.

  • Lindt Chocolate & Rhine Falls: Discover the world of Swiss chocolate at Lindt, and witness the awe-inspiring power of Rhine Falls.

Enjoy the best on-ground support as your expert tour manager escorts you to your luxurious hotel. Check in and relax in comfort, preparing for the magical journey ahead. ","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport","to":"Paris","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":29,"h_name":"IBIS DIJON CENTRE CLEMEANCEAU","h_country":"France","h_city":"Paris","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/IBIS DIJON CENTRE CLEMEANCEAU/1738756009064-2022-08-20.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/IBIS DIJON CENTRE CLEMEANCEAU/1738756009108-unnamed.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Guided City Tour of Paris","day_summary":"

Today, embark on a guided city tour of Paris, curated by travelxploria, the best travel agency for a seamless experience. After a delicious breakfast, discover the finest Parisian landmarks, including Place Vendôme, Place de l’Opéra Garnier, the Musée d’Orsay, Place de la Concorde, the fashionable Champs Elysées, the Arc de Triomphe, Alexander Bridge, and Les Invalides. Enjoy a sumptuous lunch as you continue your journey. Then, ascend to the 3rd level of the iconic Eiffel Tower for a breathtaking panoramic view of the city. End the day with a visit to the magnificent Palace of Versailles. Overnight stay in Paris. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Magical Day at Walt Disney Studios Park & Romantic Seine Cruise","day_summary":"

Today, immerse yourself in the magic of Disneyland Paris with travelxploria, the best travel agency. Choose your adventure between Disney Park, where fairy tales come alive across five incredible lands, filled with classic attractions, parades, and beloved Disney Characters, or visit the Walt Disney Studios Park, where you can witness thrilling stunt shows, experience film-making magic, and explore real-life movie sets. After the excitement, enjoy a romantic cruise on the River Seine, gliding past iconic Parisian landmarks like Notre Dame, the Eiffel Tower, Louvre, and the Orsay Museum.Overnight stay at the hotel in Paris. (Breakfast, Packed Lunch, Dinner)

Uncover the charm and global significance of Geneva with your Travelxploria representative, ensuring the best experience in Switzerland’s vibrant metropolis. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, journey through the city's highlights, from the majestic Jet d'Eau fountain to the enchanting Old Town, where cobbled streets lead to St. Pierre Cathedral and the historic Place du Bourg-de-Four. Delve into Geneva’s role on the world stage with a visit to the International Quarters, home to the United Nations and the Red Cross Headquarters. Stroll along the scenic lakeside promenade, admire breathtaking alpine views, and uncover hidden gems along the way. Trust Travelxploria, the best travel agency, to curate an unforgettable journey through Geneva’s history, culture, and elegance.

Get ready for a magical alpine journey to Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe, a highlight of your trip with Travelxploria. Begin your day with a scenic transfer to Grindelwald Terminal, where you’ll board the new 3S-Bahn Eiger Express for a quick 15-minute ride to Eigergletscher Station. From there, hop onto a cogwheel train that takes you to the highest railway station in Europe, perched at 11,333 feet. Explore the Ice Palace, where ice artists create breathtaking masterpieces, and visit the Sphinx Observatory Deck for panoramic views of the majestic Aletsch Glacier, the longest glacier in the Alps.Overnight stay at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Shared","transferIn":"Bus","from":"Geneva","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":680,"h_name":"DORMERO Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/DORMERO Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153270075-DORMERO_Hotel_Zurich_Restaurant_03.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/DORMERO Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153270185-Zurich_Airport_Zimmer_3.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/DORMERO Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153270222-Zurich_Airport_AuÃen_1.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Mt. Titlis & Lucerne: A Scenic Alpine Adventure","day_summary":"

Today, experience the breathtaking beauty of Mt. Titlis, reaching an exhilarating 3,020 meters with Travelxploria, your expert travel partner. Ride various cable cars, including the world’s first revolving cable car, Rotair, and enjoy a stunning 360-degree panoramic view of snow-capped peaks, deep crevasses, and pristine snowy fields. Don’t miss the Cliff Walk, Europe’s highest suspension bridge, offering unparalleled views. Later, enjoy an orientation tour of Lucerne, one of Switzerland’s most picturesque cities. Visit the Lion Monument, Kapell Brucke, and shop for Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates before embarking on a scenic cruise on Lake Lucerne.Overnight stay at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Lindt Home of Chocolate & Rhine Falls Adventure","day_summary":"

Today, embark on a delightful journey through Switzerland and Liechtenstein. Start with a scenic ride aboard the Vaduz Mini Train, winding through the charming capital. Then, return to Zurich and immerse yourself in indulgence at the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where a magnificent chocolate fountain and interactive exhibits showcase the artistry behind Swiss chocolate-making. Continue to the Rhine Falls, Europe's largest and most stunning waterfall. Take an exhilarating boat ride for a thrilling close-up of the cascading waters, creating a mesmerizing spectacle amid beautiful natural surroundings.Overnight at the hotel in Central Switzerland. (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner)

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Bidding Farewell to Europe","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable European holiday with Travelxploria comes to an end, it’s time to bid farewell to the beautiful destinations and the wonderful new friends you’ve made. After a final breakfast, check out from your hotel and depart for the airport, carrying with you cherished memories of breathtaking landscapes, rich culture, and exceptional experiences. This European adventure will remain in your heart for a lifetime. Safe travels, and we look forward to welcoming you again for your next unforgettable journey!

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable 16-day European adventure that takes you through some of the continent's most iconic cities and cultural hubs. Begin your journey in the historic heart of Rome, exploring its ancient wonders before heading to the romantic canals of Venice. Continue on to the scenic beauty of Zurich, then immerse yourself in the timeless elegance of Paris, including a stop in the charming city of Rouen. Cross the Channel to experience the royal charm of London, and make your way through Colchester to the vibrant streets of Amsterdam, the Dutch capital. Conclude your grand tour with a visit to dynamic Berlin, blending rich history with modern energy, before departing with memories to last a lifetime.​

Admire the stunning architecture of the Louvre Museum and the beautiful Notre-Dame Cathedral. After soaking in the essence of Paris, you’ll head towards Rouen, a picturesque town in Normandy known for its medieval charm. En route, enjoy the scenic views of the French countryside before arriving in Rouen, where you’ll explore its stunning Gothic Rouen Cathedral and stroll through the cobblestone streets of its historic center. overview:
Best India to Switzerland Tour Package – Experience Alpine Magic and European Charm

Step into a dream where turquoise lagoons kiss powder-white beaches, and every sunset paints the sky with hues of love. The best India to Switzerland tour package begins your journey into a world of serene lakes, towering peaks, and storybook towns. With Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency, celebrated Best Tour Operator, and distinguished Best International Tour Operator, every moment becomes an artful vignette. Opt for our Switzerland tour packages from India or tailor your sojourn with the Switzerland tour packages for family or the expert touch of our Switzerland tour package for couple. Our Switzerland tour package price is designed to suit all budgets, offering premium experiences at great value.

Why Choose a Switzerland Tour Package from India?

Direct Flights and Seamless Schengen Visa Support
Delhi to Switzerland tour package and Switzerland tour package from Bangalore, Mumbai, Kolkata, and Chennai offer direct connectivity and full assistance with Schengen visa application and documentation.

Breathtaking Landscapes, Luxury Trains, and Historic Towns
Switzerland offers unparalleled scenery—from Interlaken's alpine charm to Lucerne’s medieval bridges. Enjoy seamless travel aboard panoramic trains included in the Switzerland tour package from India. For broader travels, check our India to Europe Tour package or the India to italy Tour package for cultural diversity.

Ideal for Honeymooners, Families, and Nature Lovers
Whether it’s the Switzerland tour package for couple featuring romantic lake cruises or Switzerland tour packages for family with child-friendly activities, Travelxploria has it covered. Solo adventurers can explore with our solo travel packages, while thrill seekers might prefer our adventure tour packages.

Top India to Switzerland Tour Packages

7 to 10 Days Switzerland Tour Package from India – Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken & Geneva
A best India to Switzerland tour package featuring lakeside cities, mountaintop excursions, scenic rail rides, and guided walking tours in old towns.

Switzerland Honeymoon Packages for Indian Couples
Our India to Switzerland honeymoon tour package affordable options include private picnics in alpine meadows, couple’s spa treatments, and candlelight dinners. Explore romantic options alongside other top destinations like India to france Tour package or greece tour packages from india for multi-country trips.

Budget-Friendly Switzerland Tour Packages from India
These affordable India to Switzerland tour package selections combine great value with scenic experiences—perfect for every budget traveler. Also consider our turkey tour packages from india or jordan tour packages from india for exotic alternatives.

Customized Switzerland Itineraries for Groups and Families
Choose flexible packages including Switzerland tour package from Kerala and Bangalore with family-oriented excursions and group-friendly accommodations.

Must-Visit Places in Switzerland Covered in Tour Packages

Interlaken – Adventure Sports and Alpine Views
Enjoy funicular rides, mountain hiking, and boat cruises around Lake Thun and Lake Brienz, ideal for families and couples.

Lucerne – Chapel Bridge, Lion Monument & Mt. Pilatus
Explore the old town and take a thrilling cableway ride up to Mt. Pilatus, part of the best India to Switzerland winter tour package.

Jungfraujoch – Top of Europe by Scenic Train
Ride the cogwheel train to Jungfraujoch for ice tunnels, glacier views, and Europe’s highest railway station. The Switzerland tour package cost includes scenic journeys like this.

Zermatt – Matterhorn and Glacier Paradise
Part of our 3 day Switzerland tour packages, Zermatt offers panoramic cable cars and the iconic Matterhorn view.

Geneva and Zurich – Lakeside Cities and Swiss Luxury
Explore Geneva’s Jet d’Eau and Zurich’s elegant streets, gourmet dining, and modern art museums.

What’s Included in the Best India to Switzerland Tour Packages?

Return Flights and Airport Transfers
Whether it’s Switzerland tour package from Chennai or Delhi, we include round-trip flights and all local transfers.

Hotel Stays with Daily Breakfast
From boutique hotels in Lucerne to luxury resorts in Zermatt, breakfast is always included.

Swiss Rail Pass and Local Transportation
All packages come with a Swiss Rail Pass for unlimited travel on scenic routes.

Sightseeing Tours, Visa Assistance, and Travel Insurance
Get guided tours to top attractions, plus assistance for Schengen visas and full travel insurance coverage.

Best Time to Visit Switzerland from India

April to June – Spring Blooms and Snow-Capped Peaks
Ideal for scenic train rides and early summer festivals.

July to September – Summer Adventures and Festivals
Great weather for mountain hikes, lake cruises, and cultural events.

December to February – Winter Sports and Christmas Magic
Perfect for ski holidays and part of the best India to Switzerland winter tour package. For other snowy adventures, consider our iceland tour packages from india or India to finland Tour package.

Frequently Asked Questions About India to Switzerland Tour Packages

Is a Schengen visa required for Switzerland from India?
Yes. Travelxploria provides end-to-end assistance with Schengen visa for your Switzerland tour package from India.

What is the ideal duration for a Switzerland trip?
A 7 to 10-day itinerary is ideal, though our 3 day Switzerland tour packages are perfect for shorter getaways.

Is Switzerland safe and suitable for family travel from India?
Absolutely. Our Switzerland tour packages for family include safe accommodations, easy transport, and kid-friendly sightseeing.

Do you offer an affordable India to Switzerland tour package?
Yes. We have affordable India to Switzerland tour package options starting at INR 89,999 including flights, hotels, transfers, and basic sightseeing. Optional activities like ski passes or gourmet dining may cost extra.

What’s the best India to Switzerland winter tour package?
Our winter special includes snow excursions to Jungfraujoch and Mt. Titlis, Christmas market visits, and scenic rides aboard the Glacier Express.

Do you provide India to Switzerland honeymoon tour package affordable plans?
Yes. Our India to Switzerland honeymoon tour package affordable deals come with romantic accommodations, spa add-ons, and special couple activities.

How to Book the Best India to Switzerland Tour Package

Trusted Indian Travel Agencies Offering Switzerland Packages
Travelxploria is your trusted expert for Switzerland tour packages from Kolkata, Bangalore, Mumbai, and other Indian cities.

Online Booking Tips and Early-Bird Discounts
Book early for the best rates on flights and exclusive upgrades.

Required Travel Documents and Packing Checklist
Ensure your passport is valid for 6+ months, carry multiple visa photos, Swiss franc currency, and layer-ready clothes for Alpine climates.
For additional travel inspiration, explore our Tour Package India page or consider exciting trips to Spain tour packages from india and India to Mauritius Tour Package.
With Travelxploria’s best India to Switzerland tour package, discover the timeless allure of the Alps and the cultural richness of European towns. Whether you’re looking for a Switzerland tour package from Kerala, planning a Switzerland tour package for couple, or searching for 3 day Switzerland tour packages, we tailor every experience to perfection. Ask our team today for a detailed Switzerland tour package cost breakdown and plan your unforgettable journey.
